name: Potluck Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans condensed cream of potato soup, undiluted (10.25 ounces each)
1 Package frozen hash brown potatoes (2 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the soup, sour cream, and garlic salt.
2. Add the potatoes and cheddar cheese; mix well.
3. Pour into a greased 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking pan.
4. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 55-60 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and the top is lightly browned.
